web_results.title: NBA Best Bets: Rockets vs. Magic Prop Bets for Thursday 2/26/26
web_results.description: The Rockets are the best rebounding team in the NBA, leading the league in boards per game and rebound percentage. Banchero’s rebounding numbers have taken a notable dip this month. He’s averaging just 7.4 rebounds per game in February, compared to 9.2 boards per night in January. The Magic will need Banchero’s offense against the Rockets, and the former first overall pick will have to put in some tough shifts defending Kevin Durant on the other end.
